verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This old world it can't hold me I was born to be free My heart is set on heaven And my eyes look up to Thee

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I would climb the highest mountain just to reach the other side I would cross the burning desert or swim the ocean wide There is nothing on this earth that could ever hold me down For I've got my eyes on Jesus And I know I'm rapture bound

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our treasure is over yonder In a land beyond that sea I want just to be here With my Lord to reign eternally

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh rapture bound come early morning On a bright and cloudless day When the King shall come from glory And catch His waiting Bride away There is nothing on this earth that could ever hold me down For I've got my eyes on Jesus And I know I'm rapture bound
